name: Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act
description: Protects the privacy of student education records
enforcement_agency: U.S. Department of Education, Student Privacy Policy Office

requirements.title: Annual Notification
requirements.description: Institution must annually notify students of their rights under FERPA

requirements.title: Disclosure Restrictions
requirements.description: Institution may not disclose personally identifiable information without consent except in specified circumstances

requirements.title: Right to Inspect Records
requirements.description: Students have the right to inspect and review their education records within 45 days

requirements.title: Right to Amend Records
requirements.description: Students have the right to request amendment of inaccurate or misleading records

requirements.title: Directory Information
requirements.description: Institution must give notice of what constitutes directory information and allow opt-out
